reviews.review_description:
The controls in this game are the most surprising thing about it. 

Normally, when an item is on the ground in a Quest game and you need to pick it up, pointing at it and clicking the trigger/grab is such a frustrating tug-of-war that there are many games I just don't play anymore because of it. 

Everything about the controls in this game just works well. 

The graphics are adorable. 

The game doesn't hold your hand, which, in this case, is actually a good thing, because it rewards and encourages exploration and experimentation, and doesn't bore you or break immersion with tutorials. 

I love that nothing speaks any real language. It amplifies the relaxation of just being in the world, doing your own thing.

reviews.review_title: I usually don't like games like this one
reviews.review_description:
This one is so good even though I just put all the flowers on top of each other and didn't decorate I recommend from any playbase 

Best part:  really like how it's not telling you what to do like some game I can experiment and it's pretty strait forward and so I'm not stuck running around mindlessly

I would all play it from it was on meta + then I just bought this game again and I was really excited to play it again but when I opened the game my progress was all gone and I had spent days playing it and now it’s gone so don’t play this game it’s not worth playing
When I opened the menu , I accidentally clicked new game and then all of my progress got deleted it is a good game though

The response was trash. Hurt their feelings? How about refund me for my money.  They removed themselves from Meta+ and deleted saved content from those users. Even buying the game does not bring it back. Complete waste of time.

developer_response.body:
We’re really, really sorry this happened — losing a save like that is incredibly frustrating, and we completely understand why you’d be upset.

Just to clarify one thing: we didn’t choose to remove Garden of the Sea from Meta+ ourselves. Our time in the program was contract-based, and once that ended we unfortunately didn’t have control over extensions or how entitlements were handled on the backend.

We built our save system so progress should carry over from Meta+ to the owned version, so hearing that it didn’t in your case really hurts to read. I'm so sorry. It’s not the experience we want for anyone, and we’re genuinely sorry you were affected by this.

reviews.review_description: Overall a really good and cute game, the only problems were my save data kept getting deleted and the totems weren't there, but I eventually got the totems, so yeah. Fun game, cute, barely any flaws (●-●)

Update 12/12/25: I got a new headset & the game didn’t transfer any of my progress. I used to spend a whole battery in this game, my island was beautiful, but then I got my new headset & I was tossed back to before I got the whale. And now I just can’t seem to enjoy it anymore. I have to basically start over & I don’t get anything in the stores but fabric and junk I already have. I’m also still salty that nothing was added to the game after the whale. Not even new stuff in the stores. I hope one day the devs come back and update it, as it is it’s not worth the $24, it takes maybe 5 hours max to completely the tasks.

 This game is so relaxing & fun. I have finished the main quest & on to just growing my garden & caring for my critters. I know there’s some recipe cards I haven’t found yet so still continuing to search for those too.

Wish list:
- More to do on the other islands, (esp the nighttime island) more critters/projects etc.
- Visiting a friend’s garden, maybe by boat (have it as another island in the distance), even if you can’t actually interact with things, it would be nice to visit & see their space
- more quests, maybe not so complicated as the initial one.
- more islands to explore.
- bigger assortment of goods at the shop. Like maybe rare seeds or much needed/complicated items, or maybe even additional music for the soundtrack.

Anyway, great game, fabulous graphics, soothing environment. I just love it! 💙
Played 5 minutes planted some seeds built a bridge then wasn't able to grab anything from there. How am I to do tasks if I cant grab anything
If you want a fun, animalish game to relax, and explore an open world, this is your game. This game, you can explore multiple islands. And yes, you have a boat. Just get the game and have fun!

I was just playing this game normally and I sailed to an island, but when I came back everything was gone. Even my house, my farm and also all of the little people you give stuff to upgrade or expand the island. It WAS a good game until everything got deleted. I couldn’t do anything and I just really want a refund. Don’t buy.

developer_response.body: oh no! that sounds really horrible. we want to try and help you recover your save file if possible. if you want to give it a go, please email us at contact (at) neatcorporation (dot) com. we might be able to help you recover it. This is new to us but we want to help you if we can!

reviews.review_description: I love this game. But I got soft locked on crystal island because i accidentally glitched one of the small crystals out of existence. Help.
Im stuck on a rock and there is no way to get off it. I am really disappointed and I am not going to start all over.

developer_response.body: oh no! have you tried using the "return to home" button in the menu? itll teleport you (and your boat) back to your home, keeping your save.

reviews.review_description: But can you please add a 2 player mode

I originally got this game because i thought it would be a peaceful fun relaxing game to play when bored or just want to test the game’s abilities. So far I’ve enjoyed it a lot but i felt like i needed Multiplayer. Being able to play it with friends and my adorable little cousin which i’ve been bonding with a good amount… anyway i would love to play this game with people which would make the game even more fun. I explored a few islands and i thought with one of them that it was meant to be a creepy island but there was nothing there lol

In short words. Please add multiplayer mode🙏🏽

Been wanting a chill & addictive sandbox and this ticks all the boxes. Talk about an escape!! 

Thought it was going to be for kids which it could well be too but it has the appeal to everyone…if you understand what it’s trying to do.   

Fair play to everyone involved on this. Perfect soundtrack to be greeted to after a tough day in the irl world! 

A little space to keep coming back to and hope it doesn’t stop getting the support and also updates :) 

Congrats 👏

reviews.review_title: Best VR experience I had yet!
reviews.review_description:
Hands down.. Best VR experience I had yet!
so immersive and I loooooved going back to it. petting the animals, exploring new areas and especially driving the boats where my fav experiences..
10/10 I wish I could reexperience it again.
thanks to the devs for this gem 🙏❤

When I got this game I didn’t really plan on keeping it since it looked so kidish and I thought it would not have a lot of features since it was still being developed but I am happy to say this game has blown me away. I did not expect a game about gardening to become a whole adventure I am so excited for the people that get this game and the ending was so so so so good I was really upset when the games quest line ended because I loved it so much. A million/5 stars
A billion/10
To the devs: you guys made such and amazing game and I hope there are many more to come.👍🏻

It suck s
😑😑

This is one of the best cozy games in VR. A fantastic farming sim with some whimsical fantasy that doesn’t hold your hand. 
If you like Stardew Valley or Animal Crossing, then you will love this. 

Would be a 10/10 if it had a smidge more content.

Doesn’t feel great getting plopped down into a game that looks like it’s designed for a 5 year old, yet having no idea what to do. Yes, I see the iconographic signs, but I don’t know where the hoe is.  Too frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest feedback — thats totally fair.

The game is intentionally very open and discovery-driven, which means tools and other instructions appear as you progress rather than being immediately available. That said, we know that “figure it out as you go” isn’t for everyone, and we’re sorry it felt more frustrating than relaxing for you.

reviews.review_description: I loved this game but hints and mutiplayer would make it better if like we would make private and public servers and other players could join us

I really like the game. It's super fun, but my game died while loading my save, and it disappeared, i mean, it says it has all my play time, but it is acting like there's no data on it, please fix it if you can

developer_response.body: oh no! we want to help you fix this. If you want we can try to recover your save file if you send us an email at contact (at) neatcorporation (dot) com. I'm not sure we can recover the file, but we will try! I know its super frustrating when you lose so much progress.

reviews.review_description: This game is very enjoyable. The music is very relaxing. The animals are super cute! It's a lot of fun just wandering around and exploring. The visuals aren't photo realistic, but the bright colors and stylistic choices actually make the game easier to look at. I got this as part of Horizon+ but I would definitely have paid full price for it. It's very satisfying figuring out the puzzles!

Honestly i didn’t expect too much, seeing as most vr games with this concept don’t do it right, but this game does a phenomenal job. The graphics, mechanics, and the best part honestly, the adventure. Most games where you travel island to island aren’t very rewarding. As in a boring side thing to do and get resources, but this game does it right. The islands are ment for main quests, and you do puzzles to traverse the lands, i wont spoil anything here but after you complete the island you will be rewarded greatly! The islands also have a nice vibe to them, even the plants can carry over that vibe to your home and that is super cool. The main thing that was nice in this game was all the little details that come with this game. It really helps for the immersion and just the quality overall. Playing a this was a blast, and I’m only halfway done! Yeah for a game at this price its a little short, seeing as i only poured 5 hours in and most of that was 
just fishing, the game actually has lots to do after the main story is finished, so overall, if you wanna get a fun, relaxing game where you can be in really cool islands, and take things at your own pace, then this game is for you 10/10 holy peak 🙏  EDIT- Just completed the game, and it was the best game i have ever played on vr. Pleade give this a try its just too good.

I finally completed the game, and it was quite enjoyable, although I had to look up walk-throughs quite a few times as there are next to no hints or instructions for what you're supposed to be doing! And what is the point of the fish in the temple?!

I am enjoying this game a lot! I have only just gotten the puffin coop and completed crystal island, so I still have a bit to complete, however I wanted to comment on my experience so far. 
1- there is no written instructions. I have had to google a wee bit more than I would like to admit , a rusty island in particular , I had  watch a walkthrough video as you have to put the totems in a particular place a, and I was stuck for a bit, it would be helpful if there were hints or instructions I could access
This is way out of my normal type of game but I thoroughly enjoyed the no fail, no stress, chill experience. I didn't mind the cutesy style and loved the puzzles.

I really enjoyed playing the game and how it was setup, I ran into a bug of a missing item and it seems like more people of discord have reported other issues as well. There has not been any Dev response on this game or any updates on the game for months, if not longer. I’m glad I did not purchase the game, as I got it through the Meta+ subscription or I would be pissed spending the money on a game that seems abandoned for updates to fix some issues.

reviews.review_title: I love this game with all of my heart!
reviews.review_description: The first time I got to pet one of the adorable creatures I shed a tear. It's such a lovely experience and I highly recommend it!

I'm playing this more than Asgards Wraith 2? I love that game but admit that the absolute lack of handholding here is refreshing. I'll even overlook the teleport-only movement just because of the interesting places I find myself in that could only be reached via teleport. Even petting the unusual creatures you'll find is far more satisfying. This game does great at what it does, I hope the devs make more like it because all I want is more.
Love this game sooooo much. I hope there's more islands, more animals, more things to craft and do in the game.

This game is a relaxing-agitation always wandering where’s that ingredient or materials OR deciding to go fishing. Everything seemed to work very well. Keep in mind that when main menu book is open other stuff in the game stops working. 
It’s fun and played for hours at a time. There’s nothing to hard to find. Best philosophy is: things will happen anyways. 
Kudos to the team. This is an entertaining game.

There aren't many cosy VR games and the few that are out there don't quite hit the mark this game however is amazing 🤩 
Highly recommend if you like cozy farming sim games like stardew valley

I recently just finished the game and I have to say it has become one of my favorites. What I thought was just going to be a small little cozy farming sim met my expectations and raised the bar so high my stubby little arms couldn't reach it.

reviews.review_title: A sweet place to return to over & over
reviews.review_description: I adored this game. Every time I was in a bad mood, I’d go into this world and complete tasks. I know that the developers are done with this game, but I wish they would add to it or make a sequel. Doesn’t have that “uncanny valley” feel that a lot of these games have. I really loved it and I pop back in once in awhile to check on my little house. So cute!

I enjoy the updated version game but it appears to have a glitch in that the map can’t be  updated as the stone figures don’t  open up.  Nor can I complete the final task.  Lately, it’s been blacking out for brief periods of time.  Any help is difficult to find.  I hope to be able to continue to play with future updates as it really is an enjoyable and relaxing game, but right now it’s frustrating.

I feel like I could really like the game but sadly my height is detected wrong and my eyes should be on the height of the floor or something... so I am too tall in the game to act... please fix this :)

It’s basically animal crossing but at your own pace, I love the boat and sailing around. I’m not very good at it but you can make ur island so beautiful. Only 4 starts bc there are still some small bugs
This game is so relaxing and fun. I LOVE THIS GAME!!

I’m 34 not a huge gamer haven’t really been into vr much but I figured hey I need some peace so I started with games like puzzle place but this has to be my favorite so far. I’m autistic and finding calm and peace is a challenge this game nailed it though. The npc’s aren’t annoying or demanding the animals are adorable sailing on the sea is calming catching fish forces me to focus. I love making things in the game and fishing. I play it with the joy stick movement rather then the teleport though it was making me queasy so I slowed it down and amazing defiantly will be revisiting I have a lot of pictures to take however that is one negative about this game. Where can I deposit pictures I don’t want?

developer_response.body: We're incredibly happy we could help you find calm and peace! We hope you continue to enjoy it for a long time! As for the photos, we suggest you either throw them in the garbage can in the game or just toss them to the sea hehe (don't do this in real life!)

reviews.review_description: I kind of stumbled across this and absolutely love it.  I have played it for way too many hours and yet I still find little things that surprise me. I love my island animals, my garden, furnishing my house (and the broken down cottage) and going out on my little boat.  My favorite thing is my pet dragon, going out in my boat and watching her fly behind me or being on another island and hearing her near by.  This game is like a cozy comfort blanket. I am a 52 year old woman and completely addicted.  If the devs make more islands to explore (if it is dlc I am buying it) it would be awesome.

I tried to get the mole house, but I couldn’t because when I put all the crystals in the mole totems just flew around and glitched out and now I can’t complete the game if anyone has any recommendations, please tell me

In all honesty I LOVE this game and it has a calming experience so if you like calming games I would DEFINITELY suggest this one.
😊😊😊😊

I got this on my 3 month trial and I don't regret it. Really this game is so fun and relaxing. It's like if you take a farm sim and make it on islands. Loved building the boat and sailing at first felt strange, but it was so fun to sail and enjoy the other islands and what they had to offer. If you enjoy the farm sim, puzzles, and building things this will be a fun game to play.
Also dig the sea cows and the penguins.

I got so much in to this game, as I like crafting, growing, trading, swiming in a lil cosy boat games and this game has it all with perfect grafics and game engine. Please make something similar where we could grow thing, trade them, build etc. The story was nice too! Unfortunatly there is no more games like that on meta! This game is no 1 for me for now.

Was very visual, and perfect for someone like me who loves making the world their own! Full of creative aspects and cute creatures! Really makes you want to go back even after you have finished the game😂❤️

New to VR and just beat the main story part of the game and got the bracelet. It kept me entertained for hours. Great game to get your footing in VR and overall just enjoyable. Didn't make me feel super sick thanks to the teleport option. The animals are adorable! I did have to Google a little bit to help me along the way but that's okay. Nice not to have a ton of handholding... honestly if I'd given it more time before googling I probably could have figured it out! Great game for anyone, definitely recommend!

reviews.review_title: A Gem of a Game…Hours of Exploration!
reviews.review_description: Initially saw this game and thought it was for little kids but I was so wrong. It was such a pleasant and enjoyable experience to play this unique game. I hope the developers create many more game experiences such as this, highly recommended!
I absolutely love this game and wish I had a giant sea cow
...with co-op mode.

reviews.review_title: Best vr game on the quest
reviews.review_description: I love this game. I would love if they made another game. It is so much fun for a farm game.  I love all of the animals and the islands. The house and decoration is my favorite thjng about the game. Worth the money no doubt about it. I have replayed the game 3 times that how much fun it really is.

developer_response.body: That's VERY high praise! Thank you so much!! We are working on another game currently (stay tuned!) though it is very different from Garden of the Sea, hope it's something you might enjoy as well though :)

reviews.review_description: Great  game would be much better if u could have friends with

I love this game. It has so much charm and calmness. It feels like a little escape for me and I never want it to end! 

However, I do feel like co-op multiplayer is a MASSIVE missed opportunity. I would pay top dollar to have my own little island together with my partner.

I really hope the developers are planning to add more content on a regular basis. I would purchase any DLC in a heartbeat.

GREAT FOR FANS OF ANIMAL CROSSING, STARDEW VALLEY, AND MINECRAFT!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the LOVE! And we agree that it would be AMAZING to add multiplayer (as well as additional content), currently however we are busy working on our next IP (stay tuned!). It is not impossible we return to Garden of the Sea in the future but at this time it nothing we can promise either, for the moment, please enjoy the game as it is but always let us know what you'd like to see!

reviews.review_description: Very Peaceful and cozy And One Best Game On VR

I don't understand how this game has such a high rating. I couldn't figure out what I was supposed to do or how to do anything in the game. I felt like I was in a beta version that somebody had started and never finished.

developer_response.body: Hey, we're sorry that you're feeling confused, your objective in the game can be a bit abstract. While there are certain key things to discover and unlock in the game there's no real "quest" or mission moreso than what you set for yourself. But if you're having trouble progressing at all I would suggest following the signs and thought bubbles on your main island, on there you learn the basics of crafting which will unlock the boat that allows you to explore the world. Hope that helps if you decide to give the game another shot! :)

reviews.review_description: This looked like a laid back and enjoyable way to spend some time. It’s now my go to game, especially after a stressful day. There are no instructions for how to do things but to just stumble into figuring out a puzzle is satisfying and enjoyable. I took my time completing all the puzzles. Some days I just gardened or interacted with the animals, other times I took the boat out to just fish. Then I would return to the puzzles, which I believe I have now completed. I have my whale and three merchants but I have no intention of not continuing to play. My only thought is do I want to give up what I have built and start over from the beginning or just keep adding to what I already have? I would love if more islands and/or puzzles were added, or even a second addition of the game came out which I would buy in a heartbeat. I highly recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for those kind words!

reviews.review_description:
For me it’s a finding game, you need to explore the right resources and bring them back the advance in the game.

It isn’t a bad mechanic but it’s honestly a too slow pace for me… even if the ambiance is nice and relaxing

Maybe it’s a target for kids 🤷‍♀️

This game is awesome except. When I drop t a crucial item to progress it NEVER respawned.. so point i can never play this game again , and i don’t feel like resetting ALL 5 HOURS of progress ..but i still recommend you play.
￼ hi I finished the game a long time ago and I continued playing even before I finish it It was great puzzle working and solving honestly would love to restart and play it again

reviews.review_title: literally feel like I’m living in this❤️
reviews.review_description:
I usually spent a lot of time in this game without realizing it. So calm, so fun, so relaxing. Very interesting and amazing. What a beautiful world!! I spent a lot of time in this and sometime I thought I am literally living in this amazing world. I love this game so much. Thank you!!


However I’d really invite one or 2 friends to experience this beautiful world together. So that we can spend sometime together, exploring new interesting stuffs together, riding in the same boat together, fishing together.. figure out Mysterious tasks  together. Take selfie together for memories, Even just seeing beautiful sky, stars, clouds, sunset or moon together would be so meaningful!

Imagine sth so beautiful happen in the sky once in awhile at night, and being able to say hey look.. woww soo beautiful. What a breath taking moment! 


I think this will make the game go viral very fast, because one friend would ask for another friends to hang out there. And another that love it will ask another more friends and so on.. 

Just my opinion. Thank you for reading!
This game was a great quick play but the crystal island puzzle was a bit annoying

Here’s all the bad stuff so you can go and discover all the good about this game

• Bugs that need a reset to fix
(putting stuff in a composter might break the composter / jellies not generating bubbles after grabbing. A reset will fix it.)
• progression breaking bugs
(Some people reported that they lost essential progression items permanently)
• you may need to look up some stuff online to learn how to get specific items.

Me just nitpicking:
• money is too easy to acquire
• grass pouch is a bit unreliable to use (leaving tiny patches of grass)
• grass effect can still be seen in the ground that I hoe’d down.

Despite all of these flaws, I still highly recommend it. It’s a very wholesome game that’ll warm your heart, and make you wish you know how to grow plants in real life.
Vary VARY VARY(x100)cute Love it.
Please add multiplayer for free

I agree with the reviews that its an enjoyable relaxing game. I purchased it a week ago, and I've replayed it twice. I just started it a 3rd time only trying to get some of my money out of it. I sure hope they eventually soon add onto the game. To me, it's just not worth $25 for less than a week, and you've made it to the end twice.

I'm a 53-year-old woman who isn't a big gamer. 

The purchase date was July 10. Today is the 17th.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you feel like you haven't got your money's worth, if played solely as a linear experience it indeed does not take long to "complete" the game but it is built with a mind that players will spend time crafting, farming, fishing and enjoying the world as well as complete puzzles and the likes. Of course we cannot know or assume that everyone will want to play this way though.. We hope you will return and get more out of the game in time!

reviews.review_description:
I was very happy to find this game and hopeful it would be one I could keep going back to. It was relaxing and fun, and I loved the animals and the creative aspect of getting to build and design things. 

Unfortunately, after I lit all of the torches and watched the credits, I returned to the home island to find that my house and everything I had ever planted, built or set up was gone! 😭 Even all of the animals and plants were missing that had been there from the beginning of the game. Strangely, the other islands don’t appear to be affected and the animal homes and shops can still be seen on the home island.😧

I have had a look at their discord and this seems to be quite a common problem which they continue to not resolve. Wish I had checked the discord before purchasing so I wouldn’t have wasted my money and time. I am very sad to have lost everything and not be able to play anymore😔. Please fix this game! 🙏

Great game, but developers, please provide a tutorial so that newbies like me  can learn how to play the game and how to use the controls.  I really like the game but I feel lost because I have no idea what are you supposed to do, how to move around and what you can actually do with clear instructions or demos. Yes I know there is such a thing as Google but most apps have demos or instructions included in the app and you don’t need to Google it to find out how to play the game.  Once you learn what to do it is great fun, but I find it really frustrating when you open a new app with great excitement and then wonder around aimlessly and clueless about what you’re supposed to do and how to enjoy the game. Sorry to be a pain but I’m sure I’m not the only one out there that find myself lost and clueless in this amazing fantasy world you’ve created.  I’ll change my rating with pleasure if you give a hand to the new players who are not familiar with these kind of games because I actually love the game, if only I can figure out what to do and how to do it. Please help poor folks like me with limited experience in the gaming world.

reviews.review_title: I love, love, love this game!!!
reviews.review_description: Very fun and relaxing. The animals are so cute. I love it!!!! It keeps me entertained for hours. Definitely one of my favorite games on the Oculus ever. There is so much to do and it’s well worth the buy. I hate the super short games that cost a lot, this game is super LONG and a great deal. I’ve been playing it for months for hours on end and I still haven’t run out of things to do. It’s also perfect for playing sitting down. Even though there is already a lot, I enjoy it so much that I hope the devs add more islands or more mysteries to solve! I would love the ability to upgrade my boat. Or maybe they will make a new game that’s awesome like this one. Fingers crossed. Even though I’ve “beat the game” there is still so much to do. I log back in all the time to update my house and check on my village of animals and fish in my pond!! I wish there were more games like this on Oculus! Also I enjoyed the recent update with the new island and adventure.
I hate this. No useful instructions.  For an hour I had no idea what I was doing! I just wasted $20!

developer_response.body: Oh no! Thats too bad. You can request a refund for the game through the Purchase History on your Oculus app! Glad you gave it a try :D

reviews.review_title: Not a fan at this point
reviews.review_description: At this point it gets one star, I'd probably give it less if I could. I'm beyond frustrated because there are hardly any directions with the exception of a few signs. I exited the game last night and then got on again today and was in a completely different area, nowhere near anything that I was working on. This game needs a better introduction than just plopping you down and just figuring stuff out. I ended up having to uninstall it and then reinstall it to see if I can get to where I was before. I'll change the rating if I decide to keep the game.

Very short game. Too many bugs for such a short game. No real developer responses in months. Your Home bugs out at last build level, if you have any personal items in it... no fix. No care to fix. Don't care to buy, if you haven't.

developer_response.body: Hi! Not sure what you mean, we respond to reviews, feedback and bug reports almost daily! If you have any specifix issues we would love to help, feel free to join our discord at discord.gg/neatcorp to talk to us directly!

reviews.review_title: Not as deep of a game as it markets as
reviews.review_description: I had the implication that this was a life sim and town builder but the mechanics and campaign are puddle deep. It was cute and I appreciate the time spent but I could not help but feel like I was advertised this would be way more than it turned out to be. I spent a lot of time growing plants that did not actually mean anything, I got taught that there was an economy that didn’t matter, and a house customization system that maybe had 3 home decoration objects. I understand now it was made by a small team but they made it seem like it was going to be way deeper of an experience. In the end my playtime was about 4 or so hours.
I think my game might be bugged because the axe I start with is not red like I’ve seen everyone else. It’s old and like a caveman made it.

developer_response.body: Hi! In our new update the Trading Patch we added a way to upgrade your tools, you just have the default axe that you start with :) There is a merchant on the bamboo island that upgrades your axe to the red one, it's not a bug!

reviews.review_title: It was fun but after the update
reviews.review_description: After an update i lost all my progress, i have no house none of the animals i rasied, nothing why is this and it makes me want to not play anymore if its going to delete my saves

I really want to give a good review as I can tell the game is great but the locomotion issues are making it impossible to play... I either start to walk and can't stop no matter what I press... It just flies you forward..  Alternatively I just freeze and can't move at all. I know this would be a 5 star game and really dont want to get a refund so hope the developer can give some kind of assurance of an update?

developer_response.body: Hi! Yes!! We are looking to make updates to make the smooth loco more responsive, as well as making it get stuck less in areas where its troublesome to use :D If you have additional feedback or need help you can always visit our discord at discord.gg/neatcorp!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been searching for the best wholesome game for the Oculus and so far this is the best I’ve found! I love the style of the world, the farming sim aspect, and the soundtrack that reacts to your actions. Definitely worth every dollar to me and if you’re searching for a game with all of the positive vibes and no pressure then this is definitely the game for you.

reviews.review_title: Great game but needs a few things
reviews.review_description: Some maps would be nice for reference while on the islands when navigation gets confusing. Also, for those of us who aren’t full time “gamers”, some hints or more intuitiveness with direction on what the end goals are with things like crystals or statues would be helpful. I have no clue what I’m supposed to do in many cases and am just stuck or give up. Can’t figure out on the mushroom island how to get to the top level in the center. Activated all the crystals on crystal island and made the musing pedestals but only have 3 crystals even though all are active on whole island. Idk….I give up bc I can’t move further🤷🏼‍♀️

developer_response.body:
Hi! 
Not sure exactly what you mean, but having all three pedestal lit by the statue just needs you to move them to the correct position and you should be able to complete the island! 
Let us know if you have any other questions, you can always join our discord.gg/neatcorp for more feedback too!

reviews.review_description: This is what I was looking for.  It's immersive and relaxing.  The wonder of exploration without the anxiety of survival.  It really brings you to another world in a very believable way.  Being able to shift the world to fit your play space is very natural and after a short while becomes second nature.  The area I have is almost diamond shape and I'm moving the world around to fit this space.  After a while it no longer felt like I was moving the world and I do it without a second thought.  The art style is makes the level of detail feel like it's exactly what it's supposed to be.   I'm still working on the main story, but if there was going to be a sequel that was the same game in a larger world...I'd already be working the purchase into my future budget.

I’m an avid fan of calm yet stimulating games. GOTS is many more hours of fun beyond the storied game play. From fashioning decorations to building your dream home, and organizing your farm. GOTS is beautiful, sweet, and addicting. My mom is even hopping on the bandwagon! Overall this game is a must have. I can’t wait to see what’s next!
